Off Calendar Dec-12-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Sidney Luscutoff (415-989-7500) for Frank Yi, respondent and opposing party

The tentative ruling is adopted as follows: PETITIONERs BENNETT MONTOYA, KAREN KING, and BMGV, LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY's Re-Notice Of Hearing Of Petition For Order Compelling Arbitration is denied, petitioners King and BMGV failed to show existence of arbitration agreement with respondent. Re-Notice Of Hearing Of Petition For Order Compelling Arbitration And To Appoint Arbitrator And To Awaard Fees
Off Calendar Oct-18-2012 Continued To Nov-15-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONERS BENNETT MONTOYA, KAREN KING, BMGV, LLC'S Re-Noticed Hearing Of Petition For Order Compelling Arbitration And To Appoint Arbitrator And To Award Fees is continued to November 15, 2012 to be heard concurrently with respondent's motion to quash. As required by Local Rule 2.6B, Petitioner shall provide a courtesy copies of its petition to compel and supporting papers with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing to Department 302 no later than 4pm November 1, 2012. Judge: Harold Kahn Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
